## Ciena's growth valuation returns to focus following index reshuffle

Index-driven events can reset institutional ownership profiles and refocus analyst attention; if CIEN's growth valuation is being reassessed upward following the reshuffle, it could attract incremental buy-side interest in the networking name alongside the Blue Planet product launch reported in concurrent coverage.

- An index reshuffle has renewed attention on CIEN's valuation
- Coverage re-examines whether CIEN's growth profile justifies current pricing
- No specific index, valuation metric, or peer comparison is cited in the headline
- Framing implies valuation was previously underweighted or depressed in market attention
- Medium confidence; single outlet (simplywall.st)
